actions.label: War Escalation
actions.description: Pushes {countryName} into direct kinetic conflict and sends shockwaves into logistics, energy, and defense markets.

narrative.headline: War pressure builds around {countryName}
narrative.summary: {countryName} becomes the ignition point for a military escalation and immediate stress spreads through shipping, insurance, and energy corridors.

actions.label: Trade Embargo
actions.description: Breaks supply routes around {countryName}, squeezes exporters, and reroutes industrial demand into substitute producers.

narrative.headline: Trade choke points form around {countryName}
narrative.summary: {countryName} enters a trade choke and the market response spreads through exporters, substitute suppliers, and freight routes.

actions.label: Financial Sanctions
actions.description: Constrains settlement rails, funding access, and capital mobility for institutions exposed to {countryName}.

narrative.headline: Liquidity tightens around {countryName}
narrative.summary: {countryName} is pushed into a sanctions regime that tightens liquidity, payment access, and balance-sheet confidence.

actions.label: Cyberattack Wave
actions.description: Disrupts payment rails, logistics systems, and communications infrastructure in and around {countryName}.

narrative.headline: Digital disruption radiates from {countryName}
narrative.summary: {countryName} suffers a coordinated digital disruption that propagates through ports, payments, cloud systems, and regional trust.

actions.label: Alliance Buildout
actions.description: Forms a stabilizing coalition around {countryName} that helps the local economy while reshaping regional energy and procurement flows.

narrative.headline: Alliance gains cluster around {countryName}
narrative.summary: {countryName} consolidates support through a new alliance structure, creating resilience at home while redistributing gains and costs abroad.
